sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { useAuth } from '../../contexts/AuthContext'; const CustomerProfile = () => { const { user } = useAuth(); return (

My Profile

Personal Information

{user?.firstName}

{user?.lastName}

{user?.email}

{user?.phone || 'Not provided'}

{user?.address || 'Not provided'}

Account Information

{user?.role}

{user?.termsAccepted ? 'Yes' : 'No'}

{user?.createdAt ? new Date(user.createdAt).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A'}

); }; export default CustomerProfile;
